grades.expectation: Response specifies 12 months bank statements for savings showing accumulation pattern
grades.reason: Explicitly states '12 months of bank/building society statements' and emphasizes seeing 'accumulation pattern, not just a closing balance'

grades.expectation: Response requires giftor's ID and giftor's bank statements (not just the buyer's)
grades.reason: Clearly specifies 'Giftors' Photographic ID' and 'Giftors' Bank Statements' as separate requirements from buyer checks

grades.expectation: Response requires a signed gift letter confirming no obligation to repay
grades.reason: States 'Signed Gift Letter' requirement and specifically lists 'No obligation to repay (it is not a disguised loan)' as mandatory content

grades.expectation: Response mentions risk-based approach (not tick-box compliance)
grades.reason: Opens with emphasis on 'risk-based approach rather than a tick-box exercise' and includes proportionate risk assessment section

grades.expectation: Response mentions record-keeping period of 5 years from end of transaction
grades.reason: Explicitly states '5 years from the end of the business relationship or the date of the transaction' under Record-Keeping section
